channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: The band playing when a Bangkok bar caught fire mourns its members among the 33 dead
item.description: Victims of this week's flash fire at a Bangkok music bar that took more than 30 lives included four of the six core members of the band playing when the blaze broke out.
item.content:encoded:
Victims of this week's flash fire at a Bangkok music bar that took more than 30 lives included four of the six core members of the band playing when the blaze broke out.

(Image credit: Sakchai Lalit)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Fear and hope in Utah in the shadow of America's largest wildfire
item.description: People in Monticello, Utah have been tense and preparing to evacuate since shortly after the Babylon fire started June 26th
item.content:encoded:
People in Monticello, Utah have been tense and preparing to evacuate since shortly after the Babylon fire started June 26th

(Image credit: Inciweb)
item.dc:creator: Adam Burke

item.title: Argentina is back in the World Cup final after a thrilling semifinal win over England
item.description: Argentina survived another heart-stopping match when it scored two late goals to topple England and extend the Three Lions' six-decade-long wait for another World Cup trophy.
item.content:encoded:
Argentina survived another heart-stopping match when it scored two late goals to topple England and extend the Three Lions' six-decade-long wait for another World Cup trophy.

(Image credit: Shaun Botterill)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: Takeaways from Todd Blanche's confirmation hearing for attorney general
item.description: Todd Blanche remained composed throughout the hours-long hearing, but faced several testy moments during questioning as he seeks to win the support of all Republican senators on the committee.
item.content:encoded:
Todd Blanche remained composed throughout the hours-long hearing, but faced several testy moments during questioning as he seeks to win the support of all Republican senators on the committee.

(Image credit: Eric Lee)
item.dc:creator: Jaclyn Diaz

item.title: China and Xi favored over U.S. and Trump in many nations: Survey
item.description: The change is driven by improved perceptions of China and declining views of the United States.
item.content:encoded:
The change is driven by improved perceptions of China and declining views of the United States.

(Image credit: Mark Schiefelbein)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump relished in being compared to dictators like Hitler and Stalin, journalist says
item.description: The New York Times journalist Jonathan Swan says the president is fixated on becoming a "great man of history" during his second term. Swan's new book, written with Maggie Haberman, is Regime Change.
item.content:encoded:
The New York Times journalist Jonathan Swan says the president is fixated on becoming a "great man of history" during his second term. Swan's new book, written with Maggie Haberman, is Regime Change.

(Image credit: Jacquelyn Martin)
item.dc:creator: Dave Davies

item.title: Hong Kong booksellers arrested for allegedly selling seditious books
item.description: Hong Kong was once known for its freedom of publication, but political changes have created a challenging environment for independent bookstores.
item.content:encoded:
Hong Kong was once known for its freedom of publication, but political changes have created a challenging environment for independent bookstores.

(Image credit: Kanis Leung)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Cancer disparities researchers say federal funding changes have disrupted their work
item.description: In a survey, 93% of cancer researchers who study disparities said federal policy changes have affected them. Funding is harder to come by and they worry it's slowing progress in their field.
item.content:encoded:
In a survey, 93% of cancer researchers who study disparities said federal policy changes have affected them. Funding is harder to come by and they worry it's slowing progress in their field.

(Image credit: Andrew Brookes/Image Source)
item.dc:creator: Joseph Kim

item.title: China's economy grows 4.3% in Q2, slowest since late 2022
item.description: Lagging consumer spending and business investment offset the boost from strong exports thanks partly to the boom in artificial intelligence.
item.content:encoded:
Lagging consumer spending and business investment offset the boost from strong exports thanks partly to the boom in artificial intelligence.

(Image credit: AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Old rivals, new battle: Argentina and England clash in World Cup Semifinal
item.description: Old rivals. New stakes. A World Cup final spot on the line. Argentina vs. England.
item.content:encoded:
Old rivals. New stakes. A World Cup final spot on the line. Argentina vs. England.

(Image credit: Stu Forster)
item.dc:creator: Natalie Alcoba
